title: Component entity (ONT-E-05)
description: A discrete physical or functional component (e.g. brake disc, GPS unit, fuel pump). Composes entity.base.schema.json (which composes _meta.schema.json#/$defs/baseFields). Schema version: 0.1.0.

manufacturer.description: Optional. Component manufacturer (e.g. 'Honeywell', 'Safran', 'Collins Aerospace'). Free-text in v0.1.0; v0.2.0+ may link to Organization entity URI.

part_number.description: Optional. Vendor part number (e.g. 'HG2030AE32'). Free-text in v0.1.0.

mass.description: Optional. Component mass with unit. Leaf-level structure; both value and unit required if present.

dimensions.description: Optional. Bounding-box dimensions with unit. Leaf-level structure; length, width, height, and unit required if present.

criticality.description: Optional. Failure-consequence category. 'primary' = loss-of-function blocks safe operation; 'secondary' = degraded mode; 'advisory' = informational.

ata_chapter.description: ATA iSpec 2200 chapter code where this component is documented. Validated against ontology/vocabularies/ata-chapters.yaml at runtime by Phase 3 validator. Pattern here is structural only; enum membership is loaded dynamically.

parent_subsystem.description: Optional. Subsystem URI this component belongs to. Foreign key — Phase 3 validator enforces existence when present.

composition_material.description: Optional. Material entity URI per ADR-002 (forward reference; Material entity defined in Plan 02-07). Phase 3 validator enforces existence when present.
